results.term: For a full year--since March 2020, when the pandem...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: For a full year--since March 2020, when the pandemic first started. I was working from home just 1 day per week prior to that, which I liked. But I've found that 5 days per week is much too much. I miss people. :(

results.term: That's where it gets awkward. It seems like everyo...

turn_info.content: That's where it gets awkward. It seems like everyone besides me are super happy that we'll continue working from home. I hesitate to share my feelings because maybe my manager will change her mind, which would be a big bummer for everyone else on the team (seemingly).

results.term: Well, it's possible that my manager will say we ca...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, it's possible that my manager will say we can be flexible. But if so, I think I'd end up being the only one in my office working... which would be just as lonely as working from home while throwing away the few perks of working from home, like saving on gas. Plus, I think my company will probably want to repurpose our office space eventually.

Maybe we should start our own company, lol.
